news.title:
RBI fined Manappuram Finance ₹2.7 lakh for breaching KMP pay guidelines.
The lender failed to defer part of variable pay, violating RBI norms.
news.summary:
RBI fined Manappuram Finance ₹2.7 lakh for breaching KMP pay guidelines.
The lender failed to defer part of variable pay, violating RBI norms.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance Ltd confirms full redemption of 7,500 CPs worth ₹375 Cr on maturity date 02.03.2026.
Outstanding amount post redemption is NIL; last interest payment made on 02.03.2026.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance Ltd confirms full redemption of 7,500 CPs worth ₹375 Cr on maturity date 02.03.2026.
Outstanding amount post redemption is NIL; last interest payment made on 02.03.2026.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance completed NSE block trade for 1,743,707 shares at Rs.287.
Total transaction value of the block trade amounts to Rs.50.04 crores.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance completed NSE block trade for 1,743,707 shares at Rs.287.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance's CEO to take medical leave from Feb 25, 2026.
Leave duration is 90-120 days for overseas treatment; disclosure per listing rules.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance's CEO to take medical leave from Feb 25, 2026.
Leave duration is 90-120 days for overseas treatment; disclosure per listing rules.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance shares to be in focus as RBI approves Bain Capital's acquisition of up to 41.7% stake.
Bain Capital to invest ₹4,385 crore, becoming a promoter, with shares priced at ₹236 in the deal.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance shares to be in focus as RBI approves Bain Capital's acquisition of up to 41.7% stake.
Bain Capital to invest ₹4,385 crore, becoming a promoter, with shares priced at ₹236 in the deal.

news.title:
Nifty fights to maintain 25,000 after shedding 200 points, nearing 26,000 last week.
IT sector drags Nifty; focus on Manappuram, Religare, EaseMyTrip, Fortis, GMR Airport.
news.summary:
Nifty fights to maintain 25,000 after shedding 200 points, nearing 26,000 last week.

news.title:
RBI approved 41.66% stake acquisition by two investors in Manappuram Finance.
Approval includes waiver of public notice; further RBI approvals pending for related entities.
news.summary:
RBI approved 41.66% stake acquisition by two investors in Manappuram Finance.
Approval includes waiver of public notice; further RBI approvals pending for related entities.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance confirms full redemption of 6,000 CPs worth Rs. 300 crore on 13.02.2026.
All details, including outstanding amount (Rs. NIL) and last interest payment date, were provided.
news.summary:

news.title:
Gold and silver prices rebound; gold at $4,600/oz, silver at $78/oz.
MCX and Manappuram stocks rise nearly 6% from their recent lows.
news.summary:
Gold and silver prices rebound; gold at $4,600/oz, silver at $78/oz.
MCX and Manappuram stocks rise nearly 6% from their recent lows.

news.title:
Gold prices plunged 12% in the spot market, leading to up to 8% fall in shares of Muthoot Finance and IIFL Finance.
Manappuram Finance fell 2% to ₹278.7, while Muthoot Finance dropped 6.1% to ₹3,596 amid a global bullion sell-off.
news.summary:
Gold prices plunged 12% in the spot market, leading to up to 8% fall in shares of Muthoot Finance and IIFL Finance.
Manappuram Finance fell 2% to ₹278.7, while Muthoot Finance dropped 6.1% to ₹3,596 amid a global bullion sell-off.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance shares fell 9% to Rs 270 on NSE after mixed Q3FY26 results.
Brokerages maintained a 'Hold' rating on the NBFC despite the drop.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance shares fell 9% to Rs 270 on NSE after mixed Q3FY26 results.
Brokerages maintained a 'Hold' rating on the NBFC despite the drop.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance Q3 results show elevated credit costs in the MFI segment.
Higher credit costs are impacting the company's overall financial performance.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance Q3 results show elevated credit costs in the MFI segment.
Higher credit costs are impacting the company's overall financial performance.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance's Q3 FY26 AUM grew 13.8% QoQ to Rs.52,125 Cr.
The company's PAT for the quarter stood at Rs.239 Cr.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance's Q3 FY26 AUM grew 13.8% QoQ to Rs.52,125 Cr.
The company's PAT for the quarter stood at Rs.239 Cr.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance Ltd's Board approved the resignation of Company Secretary Manoj Kumar V R, effective March 31, 2026.
Ms. Aparna Menon will assume the role of Company Secretary and Compliance Officer from April 1, 2026.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance Ltd's Board approved the resignation of Company Secretary Manoj Kumar V R, effective March 31, 2026.
Ms. Aparna Menon will assume the role of Company Secretary and Compliance Officer from April 1, 2026.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance's Q3 Stage 3 loan assets fell to 2.61% from 2.96% QoQ.
Net Stage 3 loan assets also declined to 2.18% from 2.56% QoQ.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance's Q3 Stage 3 loan assets fell to 2.61% from 2.96% QoQ.
Net Stage 3 loan assets also declined to 2.18% from 2.56% QoQ.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance Q3 results show profit decline with stable net interest income.
The company has declared a dividend.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance Q3 results show profit decline with stable net interest income.
The company has declared a dividend.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance's board approved Q3 FY2025 standalone and consolidated results.
Interim dividend of Rs.0.50/share declared; record date set as Feb 6, 2026.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance's board approved Q3 FY2025 standalone and consolidated results.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance completed partial redemption of NCDs worth Rs. 150 crore.
Outstanding NCD amount is Rs. 450 crore, with maturity due on 28.01.2026.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance completed partial redemption of NCDs worth Rs. 150 crore.
Outstanding NCD amount is Rs. 450 crore, with maturity due on 28.01.2026.

news.title:
Manappuram's Asirvad MFI reported ₹156 Cr loss in 3QF26 vs est ₹99 Cr due to low PPOP, high provisions.
Losses led to higher credit costs, rising NNPA, and non-compliance with lender covenants by Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Manappuram's Asirvad MFI reported ₹156 Cr loss in 3QF26 vs est ₹99 Cr due to low PPOP, high provisions.
Losses led to higher credit costs, rising NNPA, and non-compliance with lender covenants by Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
Manappuram Home Finance reported no deviation in utilization of Rs. 22.03 Cr raised via NCD on 04/11/2019.
Funds were fully utilized as per stated objectives, with no approvals or variations reported till 31st Dec 2025.
news.summary:
Manappuram Home Finance reported no deviation in utilization of Rs. 22.03 Cr raised via NCD on 04/11/2019.
Funds were fully utilized as per stated objectives, with no approvals or variations reported till 31st Dec 2025.
